title: Hadoop MapReduce Protocol Package Documentation
description: The 'package-info.java' file in the 'protocol' directory of Hadoop MapReduce architecture serves as a package-level documentation tool. It provides essential information about the 'org.apache.hadoop.mapreduce.protocol' package, aiding developers in understanding its purpose and usage. This JavaDoc comment block does not contain any core logic or algorithms, but rather offers crucial documentation details. It references classes like 'InterfaceAudience' and 'InterfaceStability' from the Hadoop library, indicating the intended audience and stability level of the package. The file has no inputs or outputs as it is purely for documentation purposes. This file exemplifies the architectural role of documentation, ensuring clarity and maintainability in the codebase.
